meta.title: Tomioka Ski Area
meta.description: Otobe, Hokkaido — free skiing on a rare T-bar lift with night skiing until 21:00.

hero.title:
Tomioka
Ski Area
hero.tagline: Free skiing on a rare T-bar — municipal night skiing until 21:00.

live.subtitle: Lifts, night skiing, and snow at a glance

sanctuary.title:
A Showa-era T-bar
still running.
sanctuary.lead: No chair to sit on — you hold the T-bar while sliding uphill on snow. One of Japan's few remaining T-bar lifts. Tough at first, but mastering it is part of the draw.
sanctuary.noticeBody: The T-bar is challenging for beginners. Hours and status rely on the town website — call before a long drive.
sanctuary.imgAlt: T-bar under night lights at Tomioka

primary.title: Free · until 21:00 · T-bar
primary.lead: No lift ticket fee and night skiing until 21:00 — a municipal hill with retro charm that groomer hunters call a hidden gem.

secondary.title: Free groomer loop
secondary.lead: Pair with nearby Taiko-yama (Atsushibe) or Kamoenokuni town hill for a day of free municipal skiing in southern Hokkaido.

pass.title:
Free admission,
open until 21:00.
pass.lead: Lift use is free. Typical season: early January through late February. Weekdays 15:00–21:00; weekends and holidays 10:00–21:00 (midday and early-evening lift breaks possible — confirm locally). Check the dashboard at the top of this page before you go.

hike.title:
After skiing,
onsen and seafood.
hike.lead: Otobe Onsen "Ikoi no Yu" (¥400, 100% spring water), Guild Endeavour craft beer and wood-fired pizza — local staples after a session.
hike.leadCurry: Shio tonkotsu ramen at Shimae, seafood at Kourinso — easy post-ski stops around Otobe.

tour.title:
From slopes to
evening in Otobe.
tour.lead: Free skiing by day, hot springs at dusk, local food at night — a half-day to overnight loop starting at Tomioka.

sanctuary.title: T-bar guide
sanctuary.body: How to ride, what to expect, and why skiers seek out this rare lift at Tomioka.

workation.title: Free groomer hop
workation.body: Taiko-yama, Kamoenokuni, and Tomioka — a one-day loop of free town hills in southern Hokkaido.

lake.title: Otobe onsen & food
lake.body: Ikoi no Yu, Shimae ramen, Guild Endeavour — where to go after skiing at Tomioka.

access.note: ~1 hr by car from Hakodate Airport · ~15 min from Taiko-yama Ski Area · call ahead to confirm operations
